# Sample Specification

## Acceptance Criteria

When user submits a form, should validate all required fields.
When user clicks login, should redirect to dashboard.
Given a valid API key, then the request should be authenticated.
If the session expires, then the user should be redirected to login.

- [ ] Must handle error responses gracefully
- [ ] Should display loading indicator during requests

## Tag Management

When user adds a tag, should create the tag with name and color.
When user lists tags, should return all existing tags.
When user requests to delete a tag, should remove the tag from the system.
